transcript: I'm starving, you wanna go to Chick-fil-A? Yeah, I'll get the 12-piece grilled nugget, a side mac and cheese, and then ask for a large bowl so I can mix it together, and then put buffalo sauce on top, and get a Coke Zero. Okay, that's pretty awesome, but what if we went there for breakfast? Yeah, I'll get the egg white grill with the extra grilled filet, a fruit cup, and a diet lemonade. Man, that's awesome, where did you even learn all that? Bro, are you not following Seth G yet? I'm gonna make sure to follow Seth G right now.
caption:
Comment "FASTFOOD" for my FREE fast food cheat sheet

Steal these two Chick-fil-a orders to stay on track

Lunch order:
12 piece Grilled Nuggets + side Mac'n Cheese + buffalo sauce (mix together in bowl) + Coke Zero
(495 calories 49 G protein)

Breakfast order:
Egg white grill + extra grilled filet + medium fruit cup + Diet Lemonade
(520 calories 66 G protein)

These will both help you save over 1000 calories & stay on track with your fitness journey!

Follow @sethgolie for fast food swaps
ocr_text: Chick-fil-A 1830 CALORIES 62 G PROTEIN 495 CALORIES 49 G PROTEIN | 2 Chicken Biscuits 1490 CALORIES 41 G PROTEIN 520 CALORIES 56 G PROTEIN

creator: @sethgolie

parsed.swap_meal: 12 piece Grilled Nuggets + side Mac'n Cheese + buffalo sauce (mixed in bowl) + Coke Zero
parsed.notes: Also includes breakfast swap: Egg white grill + extra grilled filet + medium fruit cup + Diet Lemonade = 520 cal 66g protein (vs 1490 cal original). Top performer with 21.7K views.
